hero.title: ಸ್ಥಿತಿಸ್ಥಾಪಕ, ಲಾಭದಾಯಕ ಸುಗ್ಗಿಗಾಗಿ ಆಧುನಿಕ ಕೃಷಿ.
hero.subtitle: ಸಿನರ್ಜಿ ಕ್ರಾಪ್ ಸೊಲ್ಯೂಷನ್ಸ್ ಬೆಳೆ ವಿಜ್ಞಾನ, ಡಿಜಿಟಲ್ ಒಳನೋಟಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ವಿತರಣಾ ಪರಿಣತಿಯನ್ನು ಸಂಯೋಜಿಸಿ ಪ್ರತಿ ಋತುವಿನಲ್ಲಿ ರೈತರನ್ನು ಸಶಕ್ತಗೊಳಿಸುತ್ತದೆ.
hero.quote: ದೇಶಾದ್ಯಂತದ ಬೆಳೆಗಾರರಿಂದ ನಂಬಲಾಗಿದೆ. ನಾವು ಜಮೀನುಗಳು ಸುಸ್ಥಿರವಾಗಿ ಬೆಳೆಯಲು ಸಹಾಯ ಮಾಡುತ್ತೇವೆ.

about.label: About Synergy
about.title: Driving Residue-Free Agriculture Across India
about.body: Synergy Crop Solutions is an Indian agricultural input company focused on developing and distributing bio-fertilizers, bio-pesticides, and residue-free crop protection products. Founded with a vision to transform Indian agriculture, we bridge the gap between modern crop science and traditional farming wisdom. Our team combines deep agronomic expertise with a passion for sustainable farming. We work closely with farmers, research institutions, and distribution networks to ensure that every product we bring to market is safe, effective, and environmentally responsible.

trust.label: Why Farmers Trust Us
trust.title: Built for the Challenges of Modern Agriculture

stats.label: Bio-Based Solutions — formulated from natural sources with zero chemical residues.
Distribution network serving farmers across multiple states.
Guarantee — every product meets rigorous quality standards.
By thousands of growers for consistent quality and visible results.

cards.title: Bio Fertilizers
cards.description: Advanced bio-based nutrient solutions that enrich soil health and boost crop yields naturally.

cards.title: Bio Pesticides / Fungicides
cards.description: Effective residue-free pest and disease control products derived from natural sources.

cards.title: Consortia Products
cards.description: Synergistic microbial consortia for enhanced soil fertility, plant growth, and stress tolerance.

cards.title: Liquid Nutrition
cards.description: Ready-to-use liquid formulations for targeted nutrient delivery and rapid crop response.

cards.title: Organic Inputs
cards.description: Certified organic soil amendments and natural inputs for sustainable farming systems.

innovation.label: Technology & Innovation
innovation.title: Bringing Science to the Soil
innovation.body: Our research and development team works continuously to develop new-generation crop protection products that are safe, effective, and residue-free. We combine agronomic research with field-level insights to create solutions that address the real challenges faced by Indian farmers. From microbial consortia to advanced liquid nutrition, every product is formulated using cutting-edge agricultural science.

cta.label: Partner with Synergy
cta.title: Ready to grow with confidence?
cta.text: Switch to bio-based, residue-free crop protection today. Our team is ready to help you build a more resilient and profitable crop program.
